patch.value: Audit session covering src/mcp/server.ts, src/sdk/, src/core/extensions/, src/core/packages/, and packages/pm-*. Goal: identify genuine forward-backlog gaps in MCP protocol coverage, SDK surface, extension capabilities, package platform, and first-party exemplars.

value.author: audit-platform-agent
value.text: Files audited: src/mcp/server.ts (1260L), src/sdk/index.ts, src/sdk/cli-contracts.ts (2126L), src/sdk/cli-contracts/enum-contracts.ts, src/sdk/cli-contracts/tool-parameter-tables.ts, src/sdk/runtime.ts, src/sdk/testing.ts, src/core/extensions/loader.ts (2279L), src/core/extensions/extension-types.ts (917L), src/core/extensions/extension-policy.ts, src/core/extensions/extension-hook-runtime.ts, src/core/packages/manifest.ts, all 9 packages/pm-*/manifest.json. Also read docs/SDK.md, docs/EXTENSIONS.md, docs/EXTENSION_AUTHOR_CONTRACTS.md, marketplace.json, tests/integration/mcp-handshake.spec.ts.

value.author: audit-platform-agent
value.text: Items created under pm-5k4v (MCP epic): pm-2nvw (serverInfo.version hardcoded), pm-lold (ping method unhandled), pm-7u9j (narrow pm_append tool), pm-l40h (structuredContent envelope inconsistency), pm-rmjy (pm_list filter summary), pm-v68d (pm_schema/pm_config narrow tools), pm-4os2 (MCP tools in contract golden-file). Items created under pm-ugqx (Extension epic): pm-iljy (first-party manifests missing trusted/sandbox/permissions), pm-k5e8 (pm_max_version warn-only toggle), pm-qo36 (extension self-identity accessor), pm-aw7d (missing override testing helpers), pm-k1e4 (deactivation lifecycle), pm-z9ho (prompts/assets resource kinds), pm-pl53 (sandbox advisory trust model docs), pm-1js9 (commands capability exemplar), pm-ltbr (FlagDefinition list/default gap).

value.author: audit-platform-agent
value.text: pm_max_version is tracked in loader.ts line 907 with a // follow-up comment pointing to pm-4gw6 -- the comment uses the id format so it is easy to grep for follow-up todos. The sandbox advisory ADR already exists so the gap to track is only the user-visible warning surface, not a new design decision. FlagDefinition's [key: string]: unknown index signature silently accepts list:true but it is not enforced -- this is a real silent bug for multi-value extension flags. All 9 first-party package manifests confirmed missing trusted/sandbox_profile/permissions by direct manifest audit.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Audit 2026-06-07 (PR pass): MCP+SDK findings — SHIPPED pm-2nvw (serverInfo.version), pm-l40h (error envelope result:null), pm-yjub (pm_health summary default). TRACKED: pm-jozc (MCP hoist top-level filter keys), pm-oll8 (registerItemFields type validation), pm-l0jd (SDK manifest schema/getWorkspaceContracts memo/FlagDefinition unify). Enriched pm-ltbr, pm-1js9, pm-k1e4. See ADR pm-96wm.

value.author: codex-audit-20260625
value.text: Audit bootstrap 2026-06-25: reused existing open audit story after duplicate-safe pm context/search/list-open/list-in-progress plus status-all searches. GitHub baseline: gh pr list open=[], gh issue list open=[], latest main CI+CodeQL success at 93d3351, Dependabot/code-scanning/secret-scanning APIs show no open alerts (historical alerts fixed), pnpm audit --audit-level moderate reports no vulnerabilities. Current concrete package/SDK follow-ups reused instead of duplicate items: pm-zqes and pm-mthy.

value.author: subagent-temp-dogfood-20260625
value.text: Temp dogfood 2026-06-25: isolated /tmp/pm-cli-temp-dogfood-20260625.zy2k3q with PM_PATH=.../project/.agents/pm and PM_GLOBAL_PATH=.../global. Passed: npm install -g ., node/pnpm/pm versions, pnpm build, temp init positional --force, create/update/comment/files/docs/test run, package catalog/explore/manage/doctor empty, package init --declarative, bundled guide-shell install/activation+guide command, npm:pm-changelog install/activation, full-path contracts for guide and changelog generate, health summary. Findings: package doctor --strict-exit returns 1 due extension_output_service_override_global on builtin-guide-shell; contracts --command changelog returns unknown_command but contracts --command 'changelog generate' works.

value.author: codex-audit-20260625
value.text: Audit evidence: SDK/package, CLI UX, CI/security, and temp-project dogfood subagents completed review lanes. Full release gate passed with build/typecheck/docs/static/coverage/version/secret/npx/package-first/pack/compatibility/Sentry/telemetry ok; coverage was literal 100/100/100/100. External package smoke tested 10 pm packages with failed=0. pm package doctor --strict-exit and pm health --check-only --summary both returned ok. GitHub open PRs/issues/security/code/secret alerts all 0.

value.author: codex-audit-20260625
value.text: Dependency audit evidence: pnpm audit found no known vulnerabilities. pnpm outdated after runtime updates only reports @types/node latest 26.0.1 while wanted/current remains Node 22.20.0, intentionally retained for the repo Node >=22.18 target.

patch.value: Closed as terminal stale audit container during dedicated tracker-only normalization.
Audit wrapper remains open only while active findings need tracking.
All findings are closed or represented by current backlog; descendant check found no open child work.
Stale audit wrapper normalized by pm-psc0: all child/follow-up work is closed or represented by current backlog; no open descendants remain.
